title: Session todos tree section with add/edit/delete functionality
purpose: Provides a collapsible tree section for managing session todos with UI for adding, editing, deleting, and toggling completion status.
module_context: Exports a forward-ref component that manages session todos, handles user interactions, and integrates with a global session store and API for persistence.

steps.content: Initialize state for editing and draft text based on the todo item.
Define a callback to toggle the completion status of the todo item.
Define a callback to commit edits to the todo text.
Define a callback to delete the todo item.
Render the todo item with checkbox, text display/editing, and delete button.
Prepare the next state for the todo item with toggled completion.
Update the local store with the optimistic next state.
Send a patch request to the API to update the todo completion status.
IF the API request fails, revert the local store to the original state.
Trim the draft text and exit editing mode.
IF the trimmed text is empty or unchanged, reset the draft text and return.
Prepare an optimistic update with the new text.
Update the local store with the optimistic text.
Send a patch request to the API to update the todo text.
IF the API request fails, revert the local store and draft text to the original state.
Capture a snapshot of the current session todos.
Remove the todo item from the local store.
Send a delete request to the API to remove the todo item.
IF the API request fails, restore the session todos from the snapshot.
Extract session-related state and actions from the global store.
Initialize internal state for collapse, new todo text, and add input visibility.
Set up imperative handle to reveal the add input field.
Sort todos by order and filter based on visibility settings.
Define a callback to add a new todo item.
Define a callback to clear completed todos.
Render the section header with toggle and count.
IF the section is not collapsed, render the show completed toggle, clear button, add input, and todo list.
IF there is no current session, return early.
Trim the new todo text and return if empty.
Clear the input field.
Send a request to the API to create a new todo item.
IF the API request fails, restore the input field with the original text.
IF there is no current session, return early.
Close the confirmation dialog.
Filter out completed todos and update the local store.
Send a request to the API to clear completed todos.
IF the API request fails, restore the session todos from the snapshot.
Set the add input visibility to true.
Focus the add input field after a brief delay.
